prompt: A very long straight outdoor stone staircase ascending steeply up a hillside. Wide grey stone steps stretch far ahead in a single unbroken flight. Low stone walls on both sides are covered in green moss, vines, and vegetation. Tall dark cypress trees line both sides of the staircase, creating a symmetrical corridor. The stairs disappear upward into the distance. Warm morning sunlight filters through the trees from the right. At the very top of the staircase, a stone archway with carved ornamental details marks the entrance to an old hilltop chapel or sanctuary, its tiled roof barely visible above the tree canopy. Halfway up, a small stone bench and a weathered iron cross set into the wall provide a resting point along the ascent. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, standing at the bottom of the staircase and looking upward along the ascending steps.

The stairs disappear upward into the distance. Warm morning sunlight filters through the trees from the right.

Halfway up the staircase, a small stone bench and a weathered iron cross set into the wall provide a resting point along the ascent.
